DetachCsnInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
DetachCsnInstance.csnId: The ID of the Cloud Smart Network (CSN)
DetachCsnInstance.instanceType: Type of the instance to detach. Valid values: [ vpc | channel | bec_vpc ], representing VPC, dedicated line channel, and edge network respectively
DetachCsnInstance.instanceId: The ID of the instance to detach
DetachCsnInstance.instanceRegion: The region where the instance belongs
DetachCsnInstance.instanceAccountId: In cross-account scenarios, the account ID that owns the network instance
